name: Lotus Concentrate Pad (2x)
summary: Lotus Concentrate Pad (2x) — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Lotus Concentrate Pad set adds even more versatility to the Lotus vaporiser, enabling smooth and efficient vaporisation of waxes, oils, and other concentrates. Made for durability and performance, these stainless steel pads let customers expand their Lotus experience without compromising flavour or device longevity. Designed to fit neatly inside the Lotus bowl, the concentrate pad absorbs and evenly vaporises extracts for dense, flavorful hits. By keeping residue contained, it protects the rest of the vaporiser while allowing clean, combustion-free sessions. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
